title: Zero cost 4-slot security
rule: AMOURANTHRTX rtx() singleton — TIME, MEMORY, THERMO, CONTEXT sealed at compile time; tamper aborts with zero runtime tax. Queen exceeds engine baseline.

octree regions · mmap accounting · foreign write denied

syscall generation · layout version · seal hash
